title: Audit contract and enterprise no-deferral standard
acceptance: Package records enterprise-grade completion criteria no-stub rule cluster exception and MGA authority boundaries

title: Cluster external-provider boundary enforcement
acceptance: Cluster agents are compile-time stubbed/fail-closed in core and production-live cluster behavior requires external sb_cluster_provider library target; no-cluster public-stub route API and build-matrix gates prove core cluster calls cannot satisfy production-live behavior without the external provider

title: Canonical and noncanonical agent inventory closure
acceptance: Every compiled agent source is either canonical and fully covered or explicitly internal-helper-only with no production surface and no anchor-only production claim; manifest drift gate and broad agent-pattern suite passed

title: Durable agent catalog schema and migrations
acceptance: Agent instances policies attachments actions approvals overrides leases health retained history migrations and evidence persist in versioned catalog/storage records under MGA transaction control; old structured schema images load migrate persist reload under the durable store with migration ledger evidence and production validation

title: Engine-owned AgentRuntimeService
acceptance: Runtime service has an engine-side MGA store bridge and server lifecycle opens starts drains shuts down and persists service state through real EngineBeginTransaction contexts; live server startup foreground protection store-backed recovery killed-process restart replay lifecycle persistence and runtime service metrics are proven; broader race-window coverage remains tracked under AEIC-041

title: Durable scheduler and lease execution
acceptance: Lease acquisition heartbeat cancel action queue replay local workflow idempotency drain shutdown supervision failure restart backoff cancellation and quarantine persist/replay through the durable store; server worker leases use real MGA transaction contexts and server scheduler proves all-workers-per-generation acknowledgement under client pressure killed-process lease replay and duplicate live-owner refusal; broader race-window stress remains tracked under AEIC-041

title: Real actuator provider framework
acceptance: No default provider can simulate live mutation live providers must be scoped to a canonical owning-agent action contract and register real subsystem handler provenance executor evidence UUID engine execution context retry compensation capability and route proof records; the store bridge accepts only an engine-sealed provider registry built from route proofs persists pending action intent before provider execution proves pending-intent replay after crash recovery and all live non-cluster actions are covered by registered subsystem handlers or exact refusal tests

title: Cryptographic durable evidence ledger
acceptance: Action-dispatch local-workflow and enterprise-decision evidence persist through the MGA catalog store before success with SHA-256 chain digests HMAC-SHA256 signatures key provenance key generation storage linkage redaction retention and support-bundle tamper validation

title: Strict observed metrics and resource reservations
acceptance: Production management mutations direct action hooks SBLR action routes enterprise decision evidence and store-backed action dispatch require strict observed metric snapshots; action metric digests are bound to evaluated snapshot digests forged or missing metrics fail before durable mutation/resource reservation and management action-dispatch/enterprise-decision paths persist and release durable resource reservations with static production audit coverage

title: Management sys API and support-bundle durable surfaces
acceptance: Production support-bundle observability evidence-retention command-surface third-party management sys/show/list and mutating management paths load or require the MGA durable catalog store reject caller-forged evidence/identity truth and fail closed without store context; per-agent surface coverage remains validated under AEIC-040

title: Production build gate and fixture separation
acceptance: Release/profile builds fail if fixture auth fixture policy relaxed metrics test seeds forced hooks sidecar-only state simulated providers debug paths disabled enforcement cluster stub linking or cluster stub live claims are enabled and runtime production-live validation refuses the same categories

title: Node resource and metrics registry agents
acceptance: Node resource and metrics registry agents report trusted local node/metric state through the MGA store-backed enterprise decision bridge; metrics registry action handler mutates real current metrics and raw history
column12: and refuses cluster metric mutation in core

title: Storage health filespace and page allocation agents
acceptance: Storage health filespace capacity and page allocation agents execute or recommend real storage/page/filespace routes with durable evidence; page ledger recovery filespace queue serialize/restore/recovery classification no-direct-mutation refusals and enterprise decision persistence are covered by focused AEIC/PFAR gates

title: Storage version cleanup and cleanup archive agents
acceptance: Storage version cleanup and cleanup archive agents run real MGA-safe cleanup/archive routes with authoritative cleanup horizon legal-hold backup-hold and non-authority evidence; enterprise and DPC gates prove successful cleanup non-authoritative refusal legal-hold block cleanup-LWM advance and durable decision persistence

title: Memory governor admission and alert agents
acceptance: Memory governor admission control and alert manager execute real memory/resource/admission/alert paths with strict metric snapshots durable reservation lifecycle support-bundle redaction pressure-action boundaries high-concurrency fail-closed pressure coverage and durable enterprise decision evidence

title: Index health and index maintenance agents
acceptance: Index health manager persists canonical durable advisory decisions while secondary-index garbage cleanup and shadow-index build helpers execute real MGA-authoritative index cleanup/publish routes with validation visibility non-authority refusal and DPC lifecycle gates; helpers remain internal-only and do not become independent production agent surfaces

title: Transaction pressure runtime learning and policy recommendation agents
acceptance: Transaction pressure runtime learning and policy recommendation agents produce MGA-safe durable enterprise decisions; runtime-learning recommendations are consumed by the optimizer under trusted advisory feedback and unsafe authority refusals; policy recommendations are schema-validated into pending-review records with auto-apply blocked and invalid schema/parser authority refused

title: Parser interface and support-bundle triage agents
acceptance: Parser interface decisions apply to the real SBSQL parser lifecycle for drain/recycle and package quarantine with exact parser-authority refusal; support-bundle triage decisions call management.prepare_support_bundle with durable evidence redaction tamper-chain and engine support-export authority and refuse sidecar or missing authorization paths

title: NoSQL maintenance and backpressure agents
acceptance: NoSQL maintenance/backpressure helpers remain noncanonical internal-only and are consumed through engine NoSQL routes; family maintenance executes all local families with MGA cleanup horizon and dynamic cleanup scheduling while backpressure debt suppresses stale/over-budget results and plans debt work; parser/provider authority and core cluster route attempts fail closed

title: Backup archive restore PITR and export agents
acceptance: Agents implement real local backup/archive/restore-drill/PITR/export workflows with an MGA store-backed local workflow bridge and backup/archive/restore/export engine routes; cluster branches route only to external provider

title: Identity session and job control agents
acceptance: Agents implement real local identity/session/job-control workflows with an MGA store-backed workflow bridge; identity routes through engine security API; session control mutates server registry; job control mutates background scheduler; cluster branches route only to external provider

title: Cluster-only agent stub and external route proof
acceptance: Cluster-only agents remain disabled/stubbed in core no-cluster and public-stub builds and expose production-live behavior only through external sb_cluster_provider library evidence

title: Per-agent live route and exact refusal suites
acceptance: Every canonical agent has live route or exact fail-closed route tests across action management sys support-bundle production-exposure and cluster-boundary surfaces

title: Crash restart replay and concurrency suites
acceptance: Store and live-server gates prove service-object crash replay killed-process lease replay duplicate-owner refusal action replay state selectivity rollback/commit visibility for evidence writes stale approval/cancellation conflict refusal policy-generation race refusal before provider dispatch and broader crash/security/fault regression coverage

title: Security negative and redaction suites
acceptance: Tests cover missing context insufficient rights group conflicts redaction leakage spoofing direct actuator bypass policy rollback abuse protected material suppression support-bundle redaction evidence-retention tamper refusal and store-backed dispatch security context refusal before durable mutation or provider execution

title: Scale soak and performance overhead suites
acceptance: Long soak high-concurrency p50/p95/p99 overhead memory pressure queue depth action backlog sanitizer concurrency and lifecycle resource-leak suites prove enterprise operational stability

title: Runtime substrate refactor completion
acceptance: Agent runtime is split into auditable registry policy evidence action security scheduler metrics resource arbitration actuator catalog fault replay lifecycle rollout and API adapter modules and the AEIC-050 substrate gate verifies required modules are present compiled and behavior-anchored

title: Generated manifest and documentation drift gate
acceptance: Registry docs tests probes sys surfaces implementation matrices and agent scope matrix are generated or CI-checked from one machine-readable manifest; manifest drift gate passes against source CMake scope status and traceability matrices

title: Final enterprise agent readiness summary and ARHC reconciliation
acceptance: Public scope evidence records validation commands implementation anchors cluster external-boundary proof and ARHC reconciliation after every non-cluster agent is complete
